.or(result.summary.as_deref())\n1102\t                .unwrap_or(\"\")\n1103\t                .trim();\n1104\t            let one_line: String = text.split_whitespace().collect::<Vec<_>>().join(\" \");\n1105\t            if !one_line.is_empty() {\n1106\t                if one_line.len() > 120 {\n1107\t                    println!(\"{}...\", &one_line[..117]);\n1108\t                } else {\n1109\t                    println!(\"{}\", one_line);\n1110\t                }\n1111\t            }\n1112\t        }\n1113\t    } else if json {\n1114\t        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&output).unwrap());\n1115\t    } else {\n1116\t        println!(\"{}\", search::format_human(&output, snippet_length));\n1117\t    }\n1118\t\n1119\t    Ok(())\n1120\t}\n1121\t\n1122\t/// Run shell-hook command\n1123\tfn run_shell_hook(shell: &str) -> Result<()> {\n1124\t    let config = load_config().unwrap_or_default();\n1125\t    let snippet = crate::shell_hook::generate_hook(shell, &config.shell_hook)?;\n1126\t    print!(\"{}\", snippet);\n1127\t    Ok(())\n1128\t}\n1129\t\n1130\t/// Run index subcommands\n1131\tfn run_index(action: IndexAction) -> Result<()> {\n1132\t    let config = load_config()?;\n1133\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n1134\t\n1135\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n1136\t        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n1137\t        std::process::exit(1);\n1138\t    }\n1139\t\n1140\t    match action {\n1141\t        IndexAction::Rebuild { plugin, heap_size } => {\n1142\t            run_index_rebuild(&data_dir, plugin.as_deref(), heap_size)\n1143\t        }\n1144\t        IndexAction::Stats => run_index_stats(&data_dir),\n1145\t        IndexAction::Optimize => run_index_optimize(&data_dir),\n1146\t    }\n1147\t}\n1148\t\n1149\t/// Run index rebuild: drop existing index and rebuild from session files.\n1150\tfn run_index_rebuild(\n1151\t    data_dir: &std::path::Path,\n1152\t    plugin_filter: Option<&str>,\n1153\t    heap_size: usize,\n1154\t) -> Result<()> {\n1155\t    let sessions_dir = data_dir.join(\"sessions\");\n1156\t\n1157\t    if !sessions_dir.exists() {\n1158\t        eprintln!(\"No sessions directory found. Run 'agentscribe scrape' first.\");\n1159\t        std::process::exit(2);\n1160\t    }\n1161\t\n1162\t    // Drop existing index\n1163\t    let index_path = data_dir.join(\"index\").join(\"tantivy\");\n1164\t    if index_path.exists() {\n1165\t        println!(\"Dropping existing index...\");\n1166\t        std::fs::remove_dir_all(&index_path)?;\n1167\t    }\n1168\t\n1169\t    let mut manager = IndexManager::open(data_dir)?;\n1170\t    manager.set_heap_size(heap_size);\n1171\t    manager.begin_write()?;\n1172\t\n1173\t    let mut total_docs = 0usize;\n1174\t    let mut total_errors = 0usize;\n1175\t\n1176\t    // Walk session directories\n1177\t    let entries = match std::fs::read_dir(&sessions_dir) {\n1178\t        Ok(e) => e,\n1179\t        Err(_) => {\n1180\t            eprintln!(\"Cannot read sessions directory.\");\n1181\t            std::process::exit(2);\n1182\t        }\n1183\t    };\n1184\t\n1185\t    for agent_entry in entries.filter_map(|e| e.ok()) {\n1186\t        let agent_path = agent_entry.path();\n1187\t        if !agent_path.is_dir() {\n1188\t            continue;\n1189\t        }\n1190\t\n1191\t        let agent_name = match agent_path.file_name().and_then(|n| n.to_str()) {\n1192\t            Some(n) => n.to_string(),\n1193\t            None => continue,\n1194\t        };\n1195\t\n1196\t        // Apply plugin filter\n1197\t        if let Some(filter) = plugin_filter {\n1198\t            if agent_name != filter {\n1199\t                continue;\n1200\t            }\n1201\t        }\n1202\t\n1203\t        let session_files = match std::fs::read_dir(&agent_path) {\n1204\t            Ok(e) => e,\n1205\t            Err(_) => continue,\n1206\t        };\n1207\t\n1208\t        for session_entry in session_files.filter_map(|e| e.ok()) {\n1209\t            let session_path = session_entry.path();\n1210\t            if session_path.extension().and_then(|e| e.to_str()) != Some(\"jsonl\") {\n1211\t                continue;\n1212\t            }\n1213\t\n1214\t            let session_id = format!(\n1215\t                \"{}/{}\",\n1216\t                agent_name,\n1217\t                session_path\n1218\t                    .file_stem()\n1219\t                    .and_then(|s| s.to_str())\n1220\t                    .unwrap_or(\"unknown\")\n1221\t            );\n1222\t\n1223\t            // Read events from the normalized session file\n1224\t            let file = match std::fs::File::open(&session_path) {\n1225\t                Ok(f) => f,\n1226\t                Err(e) => {\n1227\t                    eprintln!(\"Error reading {}: {}\", session_path.display(), e);\n1228\t                    total_errors += 1;\n1229\t                    continue;\n1230\t                }\n1231\t            };\n1232\t\n1233\t            use std::io::BufRead;\n1234\t            let reader = std::io::BufReader::new(file);\n1235\t            let mut events = Vec::new();\n1236\t\n1237\t            for line in reader.lines() {\n1238\t                match line {\n1239\t                    Ok(l) => {\n1240\t                        if let Ok(event) = crate::event::Event::from_jsonl(&l) {\n1241\t                            events.push(event);\n1242\t                        }\n1243\t                    }\n1244\t                    Err(_) => {\n1245\t                        total_errors += 1;\n1246\t                        continue;\n1247\t                    }\n1248\t                }\n1249\t            }\n1250\t\n1251\t            if events.is_empty() {\n1252\t                continue;\n1253\t            }\n1254\t\n1255\t            // Build manifest from events\n1256\t            let first = &events[0];\n1257\t            let manifest = crate::index::build_manifest_from_events(\n1258\t                &events,\n1259\t                &session_id,\n1260\t                &agent_name,\n1261\t                first.project.as_deref(),\n1262\t                first.model.as_deref(),\n1263\t            );\n1264\t\n1265\t            match manager.index_session(&events, &manifest) {\n1266\t                Ok(_) => total_docs += 1,\n1267\t                Err(e) => {\n1268\t                    eprintln!(\"Error indexing {}: {}\", session_id, e);\n1269\t                    total_errors += 1;\n1270\t                }\n1271\t            }\n1272\t        }\n1273\t    }\n1274\t\n1275\t    manager.finish()?;\n1276\t\n1277\t    println!(\n1278\t        \"Rebuilt index from {} session files ({} errors)\",\n1279\t        total_docs, total_errors\n1280\t    );\n1281\t    Ok(())\n1282\t}\n1283\t\n1284\t/// Show index statistics.\n1285\tfn run_index_stats(data_dir: &std::path::Path) -> Result<()> {\n1286\t    let index_path = data_dir.join(\"index\").join(\"tantivy\");\n1287\t\n1288\t    if !index_path.exists() {\n1289\t        println!(\"Index not found. Run 'agentscribe scrape' first.\");\n1290\t        return Ok(());\n1291\t    }\n1292\t\n1293\t    let index = match search::open_index(data_dir) {\n1294\t        Ok(i) => i,\n1295\t        Err(e) => {\n1296\t            eprintln!(\"Error opening index: {}\", e);\n1297\t            std::process::exit(1);\n1298\t        }\n1299\t    };\n1300\t\n1301\t    let reader = index.reader().map_err(|e| {\n1302\t        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to create reader: {}\", e))\n1303\t    })?;\n1304\t    let searcher = reader.searcher();\n1305\t\n1306\t    let num_docs = searcher.num_docs();\n1307\t    let segments = index.searchable_segment_metas().map_err(|e| {\n1308\t        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to get segment metas: {}\", e))\n1309\t    })?;\n1310\t    let num_segments = segments.len();\n1311\t    let schema = index.schema();\n1312\t    let fields: Vec<String> = schema\n1313\t        .fields()\n1314\t        .map(|(field, _)| schema.get_field_name(field).to_string())\n1315\t        .collect();\n1316\t\n1317\t    let size_bytes = dir_size(&index_path);\n1318\t\n1319\t    println!(\"Tantivy index at {}\", index_path.display());\n1320\t    println!(\"  Documents:    {}\", num_docs);\n1321\t    println!(\"  Segments:     {}\", num_segments);\n1322\t    println!(\"  Size on disk: {}\", format_bytes(size_bytes));\n1323\t    println!(\"  Fields:       {}\", fields.join(\", \"));\n1324\t\n1325\t    Ok(())\n1326\t}\n1327\t\n1328\t/// Optimize the index by merging segments.\n1329\tfn run_index_optimize(data_dir: &std::path::Path) -> Result<()> {\n1330\t    let index_path = data_dir.join(\"index\").join(\"tantivy\");\n1331\t\n1332\t    if !index_path.exists() {\n1333\t        println!(\"Index not found. Run 'agentscribe scrape' first.\");\n1334\t        return Ok(());\n1335\t    }\n1336\t\n1337\t    let pre_size = dir_size(&index_path);\n1338\t\n1339\t    let index = search::open_index(data_dir)?;\n1340\t    let segment_ids = index.searchable_segment_ids().map_err(|e| {\n1341\t        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to get segment IDs: {}\", e))\n1342\t    })?;\n1343\t    let num_segments = segment_ids.len();\n1344\t\n1345\t    println!(\"Merging {} segments...\", num_segments);\n1346\t\n1347\t    let mut writer = index\n1348\t        .writer::<tantivy::TantivyDocument>(50_000_000)\n1349\t        .map_err(|e| {\n1350\t            crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to open writer: {}\", e))\n1351\t        })?;\n1352\t\n1353\t    // Merge all segments into one and wait for completion\n1354\t    writer.merge(&segment_ids).wait().map_err(|e| {\n1355\t        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to merge segments: {}\", e))\n1356\t    })?;\n1357\t    writer.garbage_collect_files().wait().map_err(|e| {\n1358\t        crate::error::AgentScribeError::DataDir(format!(\"Failed to garbage collect: {}\", e))\n1359\t    })?;\n1360\t\n1361\t    let post_size = dir_size(&index_path);\n1362\t\n1363\t    println!(\n1364\t        \"Merged {} segments ({} → {})\",\n1365\t        num_segments,\n1366\t        format_bytes(pre_size),\n1367\t        format_bytes(post_size)\n1368\t    );\n1369\t\n1370\t    Ok(())\n1371\t}\n1372\t\n1373\t/// Run status command\n1374\tfn run_status(json: bool, plugin_filter: Option<String>) -> Result<()> {\n1375\t    let config = load_config()?;\n1376\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n1377\t    let data_dir_str = data_dir.display().to_string();\n1378\t\n1379\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n1380\t        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n1381\t        std::process::exit(1);\n1382\t    }\n1383\t\n1384\t    let mut scraper = Scraper::new(data_dir.clone())?;\n1385\t    scraper.load_plugins()?;\n1386\t\n1387\t    // Determine which plugins to show\n1388\t    let plugin_names: Vec<String> = if let Some(ref filter) = plugin_filter {\n1389\t        if scraper.plugin_manager().get(filter).is_some() {\n1390\t            vec![filter.clone()]\n1391\t        } else {\n1392\t            eprintln!(\"Plugin '{}' not found\", filter);\n1393\t            std::process::exit(1);\n1394\t        }\n1395\t    } else {\n1396\t        scraper\n1397\t            .plugin_manager()\n1398\t            .names()\n1399\t            .into_iter()\n1400\t            .map(String::from)\n1401\t            .collect()\n1402\t    };\n1403\t\n1404\t    // Gather scrape state\n1405\t    let scrape_state = scraper.state_manager().get_all();\n1406\t\n1407\t    // Collect per-plugin status\n1408\t    let mut plugin_statuses = Vec::new();\n1409\t    let mut _total_events: u64 = 0;\n1410\t    let mut total_sources: usize = 0;\n1411\t    let mut total_bytes: u64 = 0;\n1412\t\n1413\t    for plugin_name in &plugin_names {\n1414\t        let sessions = scraper.list_sessions(plugin_name)?;\n1415\t\n1416\t        // Count events across all sessions for this plugin\n1417\t        let mut plugin_events: u64 = 0;\n1418\t        for session_id in &sessions {\n1419\t            if let Ok(events) = scraper.read_session(session_id) {\n1420\t                plugin_events += events.len() as u64;\n1421\t            }\n1422\t        }\n1423\t        _total_events += plugin_events;\n1424\t\n1425\t        // Get source paths and truncation_limit from plugin config\n1426\t        let (source_paths, truncation_limit) = scraper\n1427\t            .plugin_manager()\n1428\t            .get(plugin_name)\n1429\t            .map(|p| (p.source.paths.clone(), p.source.truncation_limit))\n1430\t            .unwrap_or_default();\n1431\t\n1432\t        // Find last scraped time and byte totals from scrape state for this plugin\n1433\t        let plugin_files: Vec<_> = scrape_state\n1434\t            .sources\n1435\t            .iter()\n1436\t            .filter(|(_, s)| s.plugin == *plugin_name)\n1437\t            .collect();\n1438\t\n1439\t        let plugin_bytes += file_state.last_byte_offset;\n1444\t            total_bytes += file_state.last_byte_offset;\n1445\t        }\n1446\t        total_sources += plugin_files.len();\n1447\t\n1448\t        plugin_statuses.push(PluginStatus {\n1449\t            name: plugin_name.to_string(),\n1450\t            sessions: sessions.len(),\n1451\t            events: plugin_events,\n1452\t            last_scraped,\n1453\t            source_paths,\n1454\t            source_files: plugin_files.len(),\n1455\t            bytes: plugin_bytes,\n1456\t            truncation_limit,\n1457\t        });\n1458\t    }\n1459\t\n1460\t    // Daemon state (Phase 4 - check PID file if it exists)\n1461\t    let daemon_status = get_daemon_status(&data_dir);\n1462\t\n1463\t    // Disk usage of data directory\n1464\t    let dir_bytes = dir_size(&data_dir);\n1465\t\n1466\t    // Index stats (Phase 2 - check if index directory exists)\n1467\t    let index_dir = data_dir.join(\"index\");\n1468\t    let index_stats = get_index_stats(&index_dir);\n1469\t\n1470\t    if json {\n1471\t        use serde_json::json;\n1472\t        let mut plugins_json = Vec::new();\n1473\t        for ps in &plugin_statuses {\n1474\t            let mut p = json!({\n1475\t                \"name\": ps.name,\n1476\t                \"sessions\": ps.sessions,\n1477\t                \"events\": ps.events,\n1478\t                \"source_files\": ps.source_files,\n1479\t                \"bytes\": ps.bytes,\n1480\t                \"source_paths\": ps.source_paths,\n1481\t            });\n1482\t            if let Some(ts) = ps.last_scraped {\n1483\t                p[\"last_scraped\"] = json!(ts.to_rfc3339());\n1484\t            } else {\n1485\t                p[\"last_scraped\"] = json!(null);\n1486\t            }\n1487\t            plugins_json.push(p);\n1488\t        }\n1489\t\n1490\t        let status = json!({\n1491\t            \"version\": env!(\"CARGO_PKG_VERSION\"),\n1492\t            \"data_dir\": data_dir_str,\n1493\t            \"data_dir_bytes\": dir_bytes,\n1494\t            \"plugins\": plugins_json,\n1495\t            \"scrape_state\": {\n1496\t                \"tracked_sources\": total_sources,\n1497\t                \"total_bytes\": total_bytes,\n1498\t            },\n1499\t            \"daemon\": {\n1500\t                \"running\": daemon_status.running,\n1501\t                \"pid\": daemon_status.pid,\n1502\t            },\n1503\t            \"index\": {\n1504\t                \"exists\":        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&status).unwrap());\n1511\t    } else {\n1512\t        println!(\"AgentScribe v{}\", env!(\"CARGO_PKG_VERSION\"));\n1513\t        println!(\"Data dir: {} ({})\", data_dir_str, format_bytes(dir_bytes));\n1514\t\n1515\t        // Daemon\n1516\t        if daemon_status.running {\n1517\t            if let Some(pid) = daemon_status.pid {\n1518\t                println!(\"Daemon: running (PID {})\", pid);\n1519\t            } else {\n1520\t                println!(\"Daemon: running\");\n1521\t            }\n1522\t        } else {\n1523\t println!(\"  (none)\");\n1530\t        }\n1531\t        for ps in &plugin_statuses {\n1532\t            let last = match ps.last_scraped {\n1533\t                Some(ts) => format_ago(ts),\n1534\t                None => \"never scraped\".to_string(),\n1535\t            };\n1536\t            println!(\n1537\t                \"  {:<14} {:>4} sessions  {:>6} events  {}  ({} source files, {})\",\n1538\t                ps.name,\n1539\t                ps.sessions,\n1540\t                ps.events,\n1541\t                last,\n1542\t                ps.source_files,\n1543\t                format_bytes(ps.bytes)\n1544\t            );\n1545\t        }\n1546\t\n1547\t        // Windsurf truncation warning\n1548\t        for ps in &plugin_statuses {\n1549\t            if ps.name == \"windsurf\" {\n1550\t                if let Some(limit) = ps.truncation_limit {\n1551\t                    println!(\n1552\t                        \"\\n  WARNING: Windsurf retains at most {} conversations.\",\n1553\t                        limit\n1554\t                    );\n1555\t                    println!(\n1556\t                        \"  Old conversations are silently overwritten. Run 'agentscribe scrape'\"\n1557\t                    );\n1558\t                    println!(\n1559\t                        \"  frequently (e.g., via 'agentscribe daemon start') to avoid data loss.\"\n1560\t                    );\n1561\t                    break;\n1562\t                }\n1563\t            }\n1564\t        }\n1565\t\n1566\t        // Index\n1567\t        if index_stats.exists {\n1568\t            println!(\n1569\t                \"\\nIndex: {} documents, {} on disk\",\n1570\t                index_stats.documents,\n1571\t                format_bytes(index_stats.size_bytes)\n1572\t            );\n1573\t        } else {\n1574\t            println!(\"\\nIndex: not built (run 'agentscribe index rebuild')\");\n1575\t        }\n1576\t\n1577\t        // Scrape state\n1578\t        println!(\n1579\t            \"\\nScrape state: tracking offsets for {} source paths ({} total)\",\n1580\t            total_sources,\n1581\t            format_bytes(total_bytes)\n1582\t        );\n1583\t    }\n1584\t\n1585\t    Ok(())\n1586\t}\n1587\t\n1588\t/// Per-plugin status data\n1589\tstruct PluginStatus {\n1590\t    name: String,\n1591\t    sessions: usize,\n1592\t    events: u64,\n1593\t    last_scraped: Option<chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>>,\n1594\t    source_paths: Vec<String>,\n1595\t    source_files: usize,\n1596\t    bytes: u64,\n1597\t    truncation_limit: Option<u32>,\n1598\t}\n1599\t\n1600\t/// Daemon status info\n1601\tstruct DaemonStatus {\n1602\t    running: bool,\n1603\t    pid: Option<u32>,\n1604\t}\n1605\t\n1606\t/// Index stats\n1607\tstruct IndexStats {\n1608\t    exists: bool,\n1609\t    documents: usize,\n1610\t    size_bytes: u64,\n1611\t}\n1612\t\n1613\t/// Check daemon status by reading PID file\n1614\tfn get_daemon_status(data_dir: &std::path::Path) -> DaemonStatus {\n1615\t    let pid_file = data_dir.join(\"agentscribe.pid\");\n1616\t    if let Ok(content) = std::fs::read_to_string(&pid_file) {\n1617\t        if let Ok(pid) = content.trim().parse::<u32>() {\n1618\t            // Check if process is actually running\n1619\t            unsafe {\n1620\t                // kill(pid, 0) checks if process exists without sending a signal\n1621\t                if libc::kill(pid as i32, 0) == 0 {\n1622\t                    return DaemonStatus {\n1623\t                        running: true,\n1624\t                        pid: Some(pid),\n1625\t                    };\n1626\t                }\n1627\t            }\n1628\t        }\n1629\t    }\n1630\t    DaemonStatus {\n1631\t        running: false,\n1632\t        pid: None,\n1633\t    }\n1634\t}\n1635\t\n1636\t/// Get index stats\n1637\tfn get_index_stats(index_dir: &std::path::Path) -> IndexStats {\n1638\t    let tantivy_dir = index_dir.join(\"tantivy\");\n1639\t    if !tantivy_dir.exists() {\n1640\t        return IndexStats {\n1641\t            exists: false,\n1642\t            documents: 0,\n1643\t            size_bytes: 0,\n1644\t        };\n1645\t    }\n1646\t\n1647\t    let size_bytes = dir_size(&tantivy_dir);\n1648\t\n1649\t    // Read actual document count from Tantivy usize,\n1653\t            Err(_) => 0,\n1654\t        },\n1655\t        Err(_) => 0,\n1656\t    };\n1657\t\n1658\t    IndexStats {\n1659\t        exists: documents > 0 || size_bytes > 0,\n1660\t        documents,\n1661\t        size_bytes,\n1662\t    }\n1663\t}\n1664\t\n1665\t/// Format bytes as human-readable size\n1666\tfn format_bytes(bytes: u64) -> String {\n1667\t    const KB: u64 = 1024;\n1668\t    const MB: u64 = 1024 * KB;\n1669\t    const GB: u64 = 1024 * MB;\n1670\t\n1671\t    if bytes >= GB {\n1672\t        format!(\"{:.1} GB\", bytes as f64 / GB as f64)\n1673\t    } else if bytes >= MB {\n1674\t        format!(\"{:.1} MB\", bytes as f64 / MB as f64)\n1675\t    } else if bytes >= KB {\n1676\t        format!(\"{:.1} KB\", bytes as f64 / KB as f64)\n1677\t    } else {\n1678\t        format!(\"{} B\", bytes)\n1679\t    }\n1680\t}\n1681\t\n1682\t/// Format a timestamp as relative time ago\n1683\tfn format_ago(ts: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>) -> String {\n1684\t    let now = chrono::Utc::now();\n1685\t    let duration = now.signed_duration_since(ts);\n1686\t\n1687\t    if duration.num_days() > 0 {\n1688\t        format!(\"{}d ago\", duration.num_days())\n1689\t    } else if duration.num_hours() > 0 {\n1690\t        format!(\"{}h ago\", duration.num_hours())\n1691\t    } else if duration.num_minutes() > 0 {\n1692\t        format!(\"{}m ago\", duration.num_minutes())\n1693\t    } else {\n1694\t        \"just now\".to_string()\n1695\t    }\n1696\t}\n1697\t\n1698\t/// Recursively compute directory size in bytes\n1699\tfn dir_size(path: &std::path::Path) -> u64 {\n1700\t    if !path.exists() {\n1701\t        return 0;\n1702\t    }\n1703\t\n1704\t    if path.is_file() {\n1705\t        return path.metadata().map(|m| m.len()).unwrap_or(0);\n1706\t    }\n1707\t\n1708\t    let mut total: u64 = 0;\n1709\t    if let Ok(entries) = std::fs::read_dir(path) {\n1710\t        for entry in entries.filter_map(|e| e.ok()) {\n1711\t            let p = entry.path();\n1712\t            if p.is_dir() {\n1713\t                total += dir_size(&p);\n1714\t            } else if let Ok(m) = p.metadata() {\n1715\t                total += m.len();\n1716\t            }\n1717\t        }\n1718\t    }\n1719\t    total\n1720\t}\n1721\t\n1722\t/// Count files with a given extension recursively\n1723\t#[allow(dead_code)]\n1724\tfn count_files_recursive(path: &std::path::Path, ext: &str) -> usize {\n1725\t    if !path.is_dir() {\n1726\t        return 0;\n1727\t    }\n1728\t\n1729\t    let mut count = 0;\n1730\t    if let Ok(entries) = std::fs::read_dir(path) {\n1731\t        for entry in entries.filter_map(|e| e.ok()) {\n1732\t            let p = entry.path();\n1733\t            if p.is_dir() {\n1734\t                count += count_files_recursive(&p, ext);\n1735\t            } else if p.extension().and_then(|s| s.to_str()) == Some(ext) {\n1736\t                count += 1;\n1737\t            }\n1738\t        }\n1739\t    }\n1740\t    count\n1741\t}\n1742\t\n1743\t/// Load configuration from default location\n1744\tfn load_config() -> Result<Config> {\n1745\t    let config_path = config::config_path();\n1746\t    if let Some(path) = config_path {\n1747\t        Config::load(&path)\n1748\t    } else {\n1749\t        Ok(Config::default())\n1750\t    }\n1751\t}\n1752\t\n1753\t/// Run recurring problem detection\n1754\tfn run_recurring(since: Option<String>, threshold: usize, json: bool) -> Result<()> {\n1755\t    let config = load_config()?;\n1756\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n1757\t\n1758\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n1759\t        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n1760\t        std::process::exit(1);\n1761\t    }\n1762\t\n1763\t    let since_dt = match since {\n1764\t        Some(ref s) => search::parse_datetime(s)?,\n1765\t        None => chrono::Utc::now() - chrono::Duration::days(30),\n1766\t    };\n1767\t\n1768\t    let opts = crate::recurring::RecurringOptions {\n1769\t        since: since_dt,\n1770\t        threshold,\n1771\t    };\n1772\t\n1773\t    let output = crate::recurring::detect_recurring(&data_dir, &opts)?;\n1774\t\n1775\t    if json {\n1776\t        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&output).unwrap());\n1777\t    } else {\n1778\t        print!(\"{}\", crate::recurring::format_human(&output));\n1779\t    }\n1780\t\n1781\t    Ok(())\n1782\t}\n1783\t\n1784\t/// Run rules extraction command\n1785\tfn run_rules(project_path: PathBuf, format: String, json: bool) -> Result<()> {\n1786\t    let config = load_config()?;\n1787\t    let data_dir = config.data_dir()?;\n1788\t\n1789\t    if !data_dir.exists() {\n1790\t        eprintln!(\"AgentScribe not initialized. Run 'agentscribe config init' to set up.\");\n1791\t        std::process::exit(1);\n1792\t    }\n1793\t\n1794\t    let output_format = match crate::rules::OutputFormat::from_str(&format) {\n1795\t        Some(f) => f,\n1796\t        None => {\n1797\t            eprintln!(\"Unknown format: {}. Use claude, cursor, or aider.\", format);\n1798\t            std::process::exit(1);\n1799\t        }\n1800\t    };\n1801\t\n1802\t    let output = crate::rules::extract_rules(&data_dir, &project_path)?;\n1803\t\n1804\t    if json {\n1805\t        use serde_json::json;\n1806\t        let rules_json: Vec<serde_json::Value> = output\n1807\t            .rules\n1808\t            .iter()\n1809\t            .map(|r| match r {\n1810\t                crate::rules::Rule::Correction(s) => json!({\"type\": \"correction\", \"rule\": s}),\n1811\t                crate::rules::Rule::Convention(s) => json!({\"type\": \"convention\", \"rule\": s}),\n1812\t                crate::rules::Rule::Context(s) => json!({\"type\": \"context\", \"rule\": s}),\n1813\t                crate::rules::Rule::Warning(s) => json!({\"type\": \"warning\", \"rule\": s}),\n1814\t            })\n1815\t            .collect();\n1816\t\n1817\t        let result = json!({\n1818\t            \"project_path\": output.project_path.display().to_string(),\n1819\t            \"sessions_analyzed\": output.sessions_analyzed,\n1820\t            \"rules\": rules_json,\n1821\t        });\n1822\t        println!(\"{}\", serde_json::to_string_pretty(&result).unwrap());\n1823\t    } else {\n1824\t        if output.rules.is_empty() {\n1825\t            println!(\"{}\", };\n1943\t\n1944\t    let output = match search::execute_search(&data_dir, &opts) {\n1945\t        Ok(o) => o,\n1946\t        Err(e) => {\n1947\t            eprintln!(\"Search error: {}\", e);\n1948\t git_blame_commit(file: &str, line: u32) -> Option<String> {\n2180\t    let output = std::process::Command::new(\"git\")\n2181\t        .args([\n2182\t            \"blame\",\n2183\t .ok()?;\n2190\t\n2191\t    if !output.status.success() {\n2192\t        return None;\n2193\t    }\n2194\t\n2195\t    let stdout = String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stdout);\n2196\t    let hash = stdout.lines().next()?.split_whitespace().next()?;\n2197\t\n2198\t    // All-zeros means the line is not yet committed\n2199\t    if hash.chars().all(|c| c == '0') {\n2200\t        return
